title: Night Game at Fenway Park — Panoramic View
description: A sweeping nighttime panorama of Fenway Park, capturing the pitcher on the mound, the Green Monster, and a packed crowd beneath the stadium lights.
alt: Panoramic nighttime view of a baseball game at Fenway Park

title: Fenway Park Under the Lights
description: A wide-angle view of Fenway Park during an evening baseball game, with the full infield, Green Monster, illuminated scoreboards, and fans filling the historic ballpark.
alt: Wide nighttime view of Fenway Park during a baseball game

title: Mike Lowell at the Plate
description: Mike Lowell stands near home plate in a Boston Red Sox uniform as the opposing catcher signals toward the field during a game at Fenway Park.
alt: Mike Lowell standing near home plate at Fenway Park

title: Victor Martinez Behind the Plate
description: Boston Red Sox catcher Victor Martinez settles into position behind home plate while the umpire prepares for the next pitch.
alt: Victor Martinez catching behind home plate at Fenway Park

title: Hockey Night at TD Garden
description: A panoramic view inside TD Garden during a Boston Bruins game, with the ice illuminated beneath championship banners and a sea of black-and-gold seats.
alt: Panoramic view of a Boston Bruins hockey game at TD Garden

title: Tuukka Rask Guards the Crease
description: Boston Bruins goaltender Tuukka Rask crouches beside the net, focused and ready as play develops in front of him.
alt: Tuukka Rask positioned beside the Boston Bruins net

title: Tuukka Rask Ready in Net
description: Tuukka Rask faces the action from inside the crease, framed by the goal and wearing the Boston Bruins' classic black-and-gold colors.
alt: Tuukka Rask facing forward in the Boston Bruins goal

title: Bruins Goal at TD Garden
description: The puck rests in the net as Boston Bruins and opposing players crowd the crease during an exciting scoring play at TD Garden.
alt: Boston Bruins scoring play with players gathered around the goal

title: Wanda and Joe at a Bruins Game
description: A lively crowd scene inside TD Garden, filled with Boston Bruins supporters dressed in black and gold during a January 2015 game.
alt: Boston Bruins fans seated in the stands at TD Garden
